description_long: This stuffed toy is modeled after Lucario, a well-known character from the Pokémon franchise. It features a blue and black color scheme with cream accents on the chest and face, and has large, pointed ears, red eyes, and a distinctive snout. The toy's arms are outstretched, each ending in a pointed, spike-like detail, and its legs are thick and sturdy, supporting the upright posture. The tail is long and blue, extending straight out from the back. The toy stands on a round, two-toned base, half white and half brown, which provides stability. The surface appears soft and plush, typical of stuffed toys, with visible seams and a matte finish.
description: A plush Lucario stuffed toy with blue, black, and cream colors, outstretched arms, and a long tail, standing on a round, two-toned base. The toy has a soft, matte surface and detailed facial features.
description_view_0: Front view showing Lucario's face, chest spike, outstretched arms, and both legs clearly positioned on the round base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the length of the tail, the profile of the snout, and the side of the head and body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, both ear tufts, the full tail, and the back of the legs and arms.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the tail extending outward, the side profile of the face, and the right arm and leg.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is intense and focused, with narrowed red eyes and a neutral mouth, giving a determined and alert appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms outstretched to the sides, legs apart, and the tail extended straight back.
